description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a natural light wood finish, featuring a flat, spacious tabletop suitable for writing or computer work. On the right side, there are three vertically stacked drawers with subtle horizontal handles, providing organized storage space. The left side has a single large cabinet door, likely for storing larger items such as a computer tower or books. The back of the desk is plain, with a small circular cutout near the bottom right, possibly for cable management. The sides are solid panels, matching the rest of the desk in material and finish. The overall design is simple, functional, and modern, making it suitable for a variety of work or study environments.
description: A light wood desk with three drawers on the right and a single cabinet on the left, featuring a spacious flat top and a clean, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers on the right and a cabinet door on the left, with a wide flat tabletop.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the solid wood panel and the depth of the desk, with drawer outlines faintly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing two plain panels and a small circular cutout on the right panel for cable management.
description_view_3: Left side view showing a solid wood panel, matching the right side, with no visible handles or features.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and cabinet door is intended to face the user, with the flat tabletop providing a work surface and storage accessible from the front.
